short_summary: Iran deal Sunday claim; gang leader killed
rationale: Trump's claim of imminent Iran deal signing is the top story with direct policy and market implications; Tren de Aragua airstrike is a continuation of established pattern.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Trump's claim of an imminent Iran nuclear/sanctions deal could significantly affect oil markets and US Middle East policy, but Tehran's contradiction keeps outcome uncertain.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: US airstrike eliminates the top leader of the Tren de Aragua gang; continuation of Trump administration's aggressive domestic security posture with limited new impact.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Federal security review of Anthropic AI tools continues; ongoing policy action affecting the US AI sector with limited immediate impact on daily life.
